ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pesticides" (
  "pesticide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pesticide */,
  "analyte" TEXT /* Name of the pesticide (e.g., 2,4-D, Glyphosate) */,
  "sort_order" INTEGER /* Sort order for the pesticide in reports */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the pesticide */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number assigned by regulatory bodies */,
  "active_ingredients" TEXT /* List of active ingredients in the pesticide */,
  "toxicity_class" TEXT /* Toxicity class of the pesticide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pesticide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_data" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "pesticide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pesticide used */,
  "percent_acres_treated" REAL /* Percentage of acres treated with the pesticide */,
  "one_time_application_rate" REAL /* One-time application rate of the pesticide (pounds per acre) */,
  "number_of_applications" REAL /* Number of applications of the pesticide in a crop year */,
  "rate_per_crop_year" REAL /* Rate of pesticide application per crop year (pounds per acre) */,
  "surveyed_acre_treatments" INTEGER /* Total number of surveyed acres treated with the pesticide */,
  "surveyed_acres" INTEGER /* Total surveyed acres */,
  "total_acres" INTEGER /* Total acres in the survey */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the treatment data */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop to which the pesticide was applied */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the treatment was applied */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., spray, granular) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the pesticide was applied */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during application (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "efficacy" REAL /* Efficacy of the pesticide in controlling the target pest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_data_pesticide_id FOREIGN KEY ("pesticide_id") REFERENCES pesticides ("pesticide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "total_acres" INTEGER /* Total agricultural land area in the region */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region (e.g., temperate, tropical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop (e.g., Corn, Soybeans) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crop is grown */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the crop */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop */,
  "growing_season" TEXT /* Typical growing season for the crop */,
  "pests_targeted" TEXT /* List of pests that commonly affect the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crops_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, regulator, farmer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the treatment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatment_data ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last modified */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
